title: TreasureHunt
description: Welcome to the world of treasures ！
body:
## 🖼️Profile:

Hello! Welcome to the world of treasures!

We've added treasure blocks, and a new structure!

Many blocks and Many tools in total.
tool:Brushes and chisels are used to mine the treasure block you find on your expeditions！

![Show](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Q8cwfRrd/images/e4779ca256f9421f683f8cbf8fb9af47bc33c055.png)

Above is a site that was born in the desert！
You can find Dust Sand inside 

And after digging it, you can also get minerals

## 🧾Effect:
This mod will enrich your gaming experience and make your world more adventurous！
You can go with your friends to find treasures in this world, which will be very interesting:)

If you like it, try downloading it！！

## 📌Update:
version:1.0.7(release):

1. Villager trading items have been added.
2. Changed the model and texture of the treasure block.
3. Removed Experimental content.
5. Added clean‘s enchantment function.
4. Support mods to 1.19.4
### This is a small update.
